data.description: Contains shape item data, such as the content or the type of the shape.

content.description:
The text you want to display on the shape.
**Not supported for shapes:**
  • flow_chart_or
  • flow_chart_summing_junction

shape.description:
Defines the geometric shape of the item when it is rendered on the board.
Basic shapes
  • rectangle
  • round_rectangle
  • circle
  • triangle
  • rhombus
  • parallelogram
  • trapezoid
  • pentagon
  • hexagon
  • octagon
  • wedge_round_rectangle_callout
  • star
  • flow_chart_predefined_process
  • cloud
  • cross

style.description:
Contains information about the shape style, such as the border color or opacity.
All properties in style object are supported for shape types aren't listed below.
Shape type Unsupported properties
flow_chart_or fontSize, fontFamily, color, textAlign, textAlignVertical
flow_chart_summing_junction fontSize, fontFamily, color, textAlign, textAlign

borderColor.description:
Defines the color of the border of the shape.
Default: `#1a1a1a` (dark gray).

borderOpacity.description:
Defines the opacity level of the shape border.
Possible values: any number between `0.0` and `1.0`, where:
`0.0`: the background color is completely transparent or invisible
`1.0`: the background color is completely opaque or solid
Default: `1.0` (solid color).

borderStyle.description:
Defines the style used to represent the border of the shape.
Default: `normal`.

borderWidth.description:
Defines the thickness of the shape border, in dp.
Default: `2.0`.

color.description:
Hex value representing the color for the text within the shape item.
Default: `#1a1a1a`.

fillColor.description:
Fill color for the shape.
Hex values: `#f5f6f8` `#d5f692` `#d0e17a` `#93d275` `#67c6c0` `#23bfe7` `#a6ccf5` `#7b92ff` `#fff9b1` `#f5d128` `#ff9d48` `#f16c7f` `#ea94bb` `#ffcee0` `#b384bb` `#000000`
Default: #ffffff.

fillOpacity.description:
Opacity level of the fill color.
Possible values: any number between `0` and `1`, where:
`0.0`: the background color is completely transparent or invisible
`1.0`: the background color is completely opaque or solid
Default: `Flowchart` shapes: `1.0`. `Basic` shapes: `1.0` if `fillColor` provided, `0.0` if no `fillColor` provided.

fontFamily.description:
Defines the font type for the text in the shape item.
Default: `arial`.

fontSize.description:
Defines the font size, in dp, for the text on the shape.
Default: `14`.

textAlign.description:
Defines how the shape text is horizontally aligned.
Default:
Flowchart shapes: `center`.
Basic shapes: `left`.

`unknown` is returned for unsupported shapes.

textAlignVertical.description:
Defines how the shape text is vertically aligned.
Default:
Flowchart shapes: `middle`.
Basic shapes: `top`.

`unknown` is returned for unsupported shapes.

position.description: Contains location information about the item, such as its x coordinate, y coordinate, and the origin of the x and y coordinates.

origin.description:
Area of the item that is referenced by its x and y coordinates. For example, an item with a center origin will have its x and y coordinates point to its center. The center point of the board has x: 0 and y: 0 coordinates.
Currently, only one option is supported.

x.description:
X-axis coordinate of the location of the item on the board.
By default, all items have absolute positioning to the board, not the current viewport. Default: 0.
The center point of the board has `x: 0` and `y: 0` coordinates.

y.description:
Y-axis coordinate of the location of the item on the board.
By default, all items have absolute positioning to the board, not the current viewport. Default: 0.
The center point of the board has `x: 0` and `y: 0` coordinates.

geometry.description: Contains geometrical information about the item, such as its width or height.

height.description: Height of the item, in pixels.

rotation.description: Rotation angle of an item, in degrees, relative to the board. You can rotate items clockwise (right) and counterclockwise (left) by specifying positive and negative values, respectively.

width.description: Width of the item, in pixels.

createdAt.description:
Date and time when the item was created.
Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

createdBy.description: Contains information about the user who created the item.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

modifiedAt.description:
Date and time when the item was last modified.
Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

modifiedBy.description: Contains information about the user who last modified the item.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

parent.description: Contains information about the parent frame for the item.

id.description: Unique identifier (ID) of the parent frame for the item.

links.description: Contains applicable links for the current object.

self.description: Link to obtain more information about the current object.

links.description: Contains applicable links for the item.

related.description: Link to obtain information about the child items related to the frame.

self.description: Link to obtain information about the current item.

type.description: Type of item that is returned.
